# [Hiring] Senior AI Engineer @Infios

1mth ago - Infios is hiring a remote Senior AI Engineer. 💸 Salary: unspecified 📍Location: Worldwide

Role Description

We are looking for an experienced and ambitious Senior Software Engineer with Python & GenAI skills to join our growing global and distributed product development team. As a tech savvy AI software craftsman, you must have a deep understanding of coding principles, understand object-oriented programming and appreciate the agile development way of working. All developers are encouraged to consistently assist in innovation of the software development in terms of agility, DevOps and modern development technologies.

This role is anything but your average Senior Software Engineer job; you will have the opportunity to work on exciting new solutions by using LLM models to improve the user experience in our warehouse management product. We operate daily stand-ups, sprint retrospectives, and SCRUM tactics. We pride ourselves as being an innovative company and provide you with all the modern tools that you will need to be successful in your lifelong career with us.

What a day in the life looks like:

* Design, develop & maintain AI-driven solutions using Python, LLM frameworks, APIs and modern AI tooling
* Build and evolve generative AI and agentic systems, including architecture design, technical specs & design reviews
* Collaborate cross-functionally with product, data & engineering teams to deliver scalable, reliable AI solutions
* Deliver high-quality, unit- & integration-tested components following best practices and Agile methodologies (Scrum/Kanban)
* Contribute to feature estimation, system enhancements and continuous optimisation of algorithms and AI performance
* Work in a fast-paced, agile environment, taking ownership beyond your core scope and supporting broader team initiatives

Qualifications

* 5+ years in software engineering with strong Python skills and experience in AI/GenAI (LangChain, Google ADK, LLMs, agentic systems)
* Hands-on experience building & deploying AI solutions (RAG, embeddings, fine-tuning, AI APIs & web services)
* Strong data skills (PostgreSQL, vector DBs) and understanding of software architecture, design patterns & microservices
* Experience with CI/CD (Azure DevOps), testing (unit/integration), Git, containers (Docker/Kubernetes) and development tools (VS Code, PyCharm)
* Solid analytical mindset, strong problem-solving skills, prompt engineering expertise and understanding of responsible AI (bias/safety)
* Strong communication & collaboration skills; ideally mentoring experience, Agile mindset and domain exposure (retail/logistics/supply chain)

Benefits

* At Infios, we're not just looking for employee
reason: Candidate's extensive AI/LLM backend experience and remote work preference align well with this worldwide remote Senior AI Engineer role.

title: Go Developer - AI & ML at Civo
content:
Posted 2 months ago

Civo

# Go Developer - AI & ML

4 x 8hr days100% payRemote · Worldwide

**About Civo:**

Civo is revolutionising the cloud industry by providing developers and businesses with cutting-edge, developer-friendly cloud solutions. With a focus on simplicity, performance, and reliability, Civo enables its clients to unleash the full potential of their projects and scale with ease. As a company committed to excellence and innovation, Civo values diversity, collaboration, and continuous improvement.

**About the Role:**

Are you up to the challenge of building the cloud with us? Are you an experienced developer with a strong background in machine learning and cloud-based services? We have an international, fully remote team working on creating the best Kubernetes-first, innovative virtualization platform around, and we'd like you to join our Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning team.

This team builds and maintains various Civo services touching Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. Building on the bedrock of the CivoStack and Kubernetes teams’ work, you'd be improving existing services such as Civo Kubeflow as a Service, as well as working on entirely new cloud-based "machine learning as a service" products such as Civo Vision.

**Responsibilities:**

* Develop and maintain scalable, efficient code for the Machine Learning components of the Civo Cloud Platform using Golang
* Ensure code quality, performance, and reliability through comprehensive testing and optimization
* Utilize concurrency patterns (goroutines, channels) to optimize performance
* Collaborate with designers, product managers, and other engineers to translate requirements into technical solutions
* Improve team performance through refactoring, optimizing and improving the documentation of code and the application of best practices
* Participate in code reviews, providing constructive feedback and fostering a collaborative environment
* Stay up-to-date with the latest Go language trends, libraries, and tools
* Troubleshoot and debug complex technical issues

**Requirements:**

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering or a related field, or proven related professional experience
* 4+ years of professional experience developing software, preferably in Go
* Proven experience with containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes)
* Proven Experience deploying Machine Learning solutions
* Experience developing Kubernetes Operators
* Experience with API design and development principles (RESTful APIs)
* Strong written and verbal communication skills

**Nice to Have:**

* Experience working in asynchronous agile software teams
* Experience building and training Machine Learning Models
* Experience building applications using WebSockets
* 2+ years of experience in Python or R
* Familiarity with microservices architecture and distributed systems
* Experience with web development frameworks (e.g., Gorilla, Gin, Echo)
* Experience working in fully r
stack: Go, Machine Learning, Kubernetes, Kubeflow, ML services, Cloud
reason: Fully remote worldwide matches candidate's location preference and aligns with AI/ML backend expertise.
